languages.text: "Развеивать тайны — на благо Человечества и во имя Империума. Возможно, тебе стоит перечитать свой Патент, {name} — эти слова выдают гордыню, которая может погубить твою душу".

traits.locale_text: "Развеивать тайны — на благо Человечества и во имя Империума. Возможно, тебе стоит перечитать свой Патент, {name} — эти слова выдают гордыню, которая может погубить твою душу".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
languages.original_text: "Развеивать тайны — на благо Человечества и во имя Империума. Возможно, тебе стоит перечитать свой Патент, {name} — эти слова выдают гордыню, которая может погубить твою душу".

traits.locale_text: "For the good of Mankind and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "For the good of Mankind and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "Für das Wohl der Menschheit und den Ruhm des Imperiums. Ihr solltet vielleicht noch einmal Euren Haftbefehl lesen, {name} — diese Worte verraten eine Hybris, die Euch Eure Seele kosten könnte."
languages.original_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."

traits.locale_text: "Für das Wohl der Menschheit und den Ruhm des Imperiums. Ihr solltet vielleicht noch einmal Euren Haftbefehl lesen, {name} — diese Worte verraten eine Hybris, die Euch Eure Seele kosten könnte."

languages.text: "Pour le bien de l'humanité et la gloire de l'Imperium. Vous devriez peut-être relire votre mandat, {name} — ces mots trahissent un orgueil démesuré qui pourrait vous coûter votre âme."
languages.original_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."

traits.locale_text: "Pour le bien de l'humanité et la gloire de l'Imperium. Vous devriez peut-être relire votre mandat, {name} — ces mots trahissent un orgueil démesuré qui pourrait vous coûter votre âme."

languages.text: "Por el bien de la Humanidad y la gloria del Imperio. Puede que quieras volver a leer tu Orden, {name} — estas palabras traicionan una arrogancia que puede costarte el alma".
languages.original_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."

traits.locale_text: "Por el bien de la Humanidad y la gloria del Imperio. Puede que quieras volver a leer tu Orden, {name} — estas palabras traicionan una arrogancia que puede costarte el alma".

languages.text: "İnsanlığın iyiliği ve Imperium'un ihtişamı için. Warrant'ınızı tekrar okumak isteyebilirsiniz, {name} — bu sözler size ruhunuza mal olabilecek bir kibre ihanet ediyor."
languages.original_text: "For the good of Humanity and the glory of the Imperium. You may want to read your Warrant again, {name} — these words betray hubris that may cost you your soul."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın iyiliği ve Imperium'un ihtişamı için. Warrant'ınızı tekrar okumak isteyebilirsiniz, {name} — bu sözler size ruhunuza mal olabilecek bir kibre ihanet ediyor."
